sourceDesc.p: Downloaded from https://medium.com/@louBurnard/autobio-still-in-motion-317f4d866bef and translated from HTML to TEI

body.head: Autobio still in motion
body.p: One of the reasons I don’t much like Medium as a medium for my important autobiographical jottings is that I can’t work in the editing environment I use for everything else, i.e. TEI XML. And all the usual ones about having to lock my stuff away in a proprietary format I can’t control, of course. So,as 2021 closes down shop, I am now seriously thinking of how to move over to straight and simple TEI-based files, rendered with CETEICEAN.

As proof of concept, here’s another travelogue, all about my rather busy November 2021. Will there be opportunities for such gadding about in the future? Who knows, but just for the record here’s the bare bones of two visits to France and one to Nottingham.
